scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,frontend -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd server dev" "bun run --cwd frontend dev"
scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:server && bun run build:frontend
scripts.check: bun run --cwd shared check && bun run --cwd server check && bun run --cwd frontend check
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd shared lint && bun run --cwd server lint && bun run --cwd frontend lint
scripts.test: bun run --cwd shared test && bun run --cwd server test
scripts.package:macos:zip: bun run scripts/package-macos.ts && cd release && ditto -c -k --sequesterRsrc --keepParent AgentBIU-macos AgentBIU-macos.zip
